message:
indexing: track content job sizes and expose progress

- extend IPC status payload with content job/byte totals and remaining estimates
- add per-volume byte counts, content pending counts, and job size tracking for NTFS scans
- scheduler now increments content plan on enqueue, reports remaining via queue depth/active workers
- status provider stores content totals/averages; status response updated accordingly
- include file_size in JobSpec and propagate into index-worker, fixing background priority cast warning

files.patch:
@@ -14,6 +14,8 @@ pub struct JobSpec {
     pub max_bytes: Option<usize>,
     #[serde(default)]
     pub max_chars: Option<usize>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub file_size: u64,
 }
 
 #[derive(Debug, Serialize)]
